    Customer Care

    Help & Support

    Call Restaurant Email Support
    Where can I track my order?

    After placing an order, your order summary and bill are available on the checkout page. For live updates, call support.

    Can I change delivery to pickup?

    Yes. Choose Delivery, Pickup, or Dine In before checkout. The selected option is carried into billing.

    How do coupons work?

    Use SAVE10 during checkout for 10% off on orders above ₹500.

    What payment options are available?

    Cash on Delivery, UPI, Credit Card, and Debit Card are available in checkout.

    Your Voice

    Feedback

    Preferences

    Settings

    Default order mode Delivery
    Motion Hero background animation
    Order Alerts Show cart and checkout updates
    Checkout Memory Keep delivery details for next order
    Menu View Compact food cards
    Cart 0 items in My Bag

    Hi! Ask me for combo ideas, spicy picks, desserts, or what matches your cart.
